code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn index_of_sub(_ s: String, _ needle: String) -> Option<Int>
  let sn = string.len(s)
  let nn = string.len(needle)
  if nn == 0
    return Some(0)
  end
  mut i = 0
  while i + nn <= sn
    let slice = string.substring(s, i, i + nn)
    if slice == needle
      return Some(i)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  None
end

fn find_newline_from(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  while i < n
    if byte_or(s, i) == 10
      return i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  n
end

fn parse_count(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn update_acc(_ acc: String, _ token: String) -> String
  let needle = "\n#{token}\t"
  match index_of_sub(acc, needle)
  when Some(p)
    let prefix_len = p + string.len(needle)
    let nl = find_newline_from(acc, prefix_len)
    let count_str = string.substring(acc, prefix_len, nl)
    let new_count = parse_count(count_str) + 1
    let head = string.substring(acc, 0, prefix_len)
    let tail = string.substring(acc, nl, string.len(acc))
    "#{head}#{new_count}#{tail}"
  when None
    "#{acc}#{token}\t1\n"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut acc = "\n"
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or(text, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        acc = update_acc(acc, cur)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    acc = update_acc(acc, cur)
  end

  let an = string.len(acc)
  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0
  mut j = 1
  while j < an
    mut k = j
    while k < an and byte_or(acc, k) != 9
      k = k + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(acc, j, k)
    let nl = find_newline_from(acc, k + 1)
    let cnt_str = string.substring(acc, k + 1, nl)
    let cnt = parse_count(cnt_str)
    if cnt > best_count
      best_count = cnt
      best_token = tok
    end
    j = nl + 1
  end

  println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
end
